product_highlights: Complete one-stop solution for polypeptide development from research to pilot production
Bioactive peptide solutions for cosmetic and pharmaceutical applications
Formulation design, assessment, and characterization services
Carrier peptide and signal peptide portfolios
notes: Spec-Chem Industry Inc. is a Taiwan-based specialty chemical supplier providing bioactive peptide solutions for cosmetic and pharmaceutical applications. They offer a one-stop solution for polypeptide development from research to pilot production, including formulation design, assessment, and characterization. Their carrier peptide portfolio supports premium skincare formulations focused on skin repair, anti-aging, and delivery optimization.
